description: §23.5.2 — `capabilities=[]` is the explicit declare-nothing form (equivalent to an omitted attribute, §23.5.4). With NO foreign-code construct present it COMPILES CLEAN: the empty bracket parses to a zero-token capability list (no E-SCOPE-001, no W-ATTR-001), and because no foreign construct is governed, the §23.5.5 presence-nudge W-FOREIGN-UNDECLARED-CAPABILITY does NOT fire (the lint keys on a foreign construct, not on the empty declaration itself).
rationale: §23.5.2: `capabilities=[]` = declare-nothing. The empty list is well-formed (no unknown token). The presence-nudge lint (§23.5.5) fires only on a FOREIGN construct under an empty set — with no `_{}`/WASM/sidecar here, it stays silent.
